themes.name: Dr. Stone
themes.author: 8Bit
themes.description: Dr. Stone-inspired theme with a vibrant oceanic palette, custom fonts, and enhanced visual effects for a refreshing Discord experience.

themes.name: Hello World
themes.author: 8Bit
themes.description: A theme inspired by the iconic Artemis II "Hello World" photograph — Earth glowing in moonlight from lunar distance, auroras crowning the poles. Upbeat greens and blues with Fredoka for a cosmic, feel-good vibe.

themes.name: Kaguya
themes.author: 8Bit
themes.description: Ai Hayasaka theme — warm gold, sapphire blue, and sakura pink against a deep night sky. Inspired by Kaguya-sama: Love is War.
